signals.idea: Fix three editor pane issues: 1) unlock pane on navigate to editor page, 2) no content shift when locking pane, 3) editor pane should be 70% when both editor+generation panes locked

unresolved_flags.concern: Step 3 changes the context's ideal editor height, but the rendered editor pane is further reduced in `EditorPaneTab`, so this plan will not reliably produce a 70% editor when the generations pane is also visible.
Step 2's proposed effect is keyed only to `location.pathname`, so it can miss the exact case where the persisted editor lock hydrates after mount while the user is already on `/tools/video-editor`.

signals.loop_summary: Iteration 1. Weighted score trajectory: 4.0. Plan deltas: n/a. Recurring critiques: 0. Resolved flags: 0. Open significant flags: 2.

items: Navigating to /tools/video-editor with editor pane locked → pane auto-unlocks (lock state persisted as false)
Locking the editor pane on any tool page does NOT add paddingTop to the main content area — content stays in place
When both editor and generations panes are locked/visible, editor pane height is 70% of viewport (not 90%)
When only editor pane is locked (generations not visible), editor pane height remains 90% of viewport
All existing tests in PanesContext.test.tsx, LayoutMainContent.test.tsx, and usePaneLockPolicyState.test.ts pass

unresolved_flags.concern: Step 3 changes the context's ideal editor height, but the rendered editor pane is further reduced in `EditorPaneTab`, so this plan will not reliably produce a 70% editor when the generations pane is also visible.
unresolved_flags.evidence: `src/shared/contexts/PanesContext.tsx:141-169` computes `effectiveEditorPaneHeight`, but `src/features/editor/components/EditorPaneTab.tsx:41-47` then subtracts `effectiveGenerationsPaneHeight` again before using that value for the tab position and pane `height` at `:98` and `:132`. On common viewports, lowering the ideal from 90% to 70% in `PanesContext` either has no effect after `getEffectivePaneHeights(...)` clamps it, or still gets reduced again by the generations offset, so the user-facing pane height will not match the stated 70% target.

unresolved_flags.concern: Step 2's proposed effect is keyed only to `location.pathname`, so it can miss the exact case where the persisted editor lock hydrates after mount while the user is already on `/tools/video-editor`.
unresolved_flags.evidence: `src/shared/contexts/usePaneLockPolicyState.ts:26-56` initializes from `useUserUIState(...)` and then reapplies `paneLocks` when loading completes. If `EditorPaneTab` mounts on the editor route before that hydration finishes, an effect with deps `[location.pathname]` can run once while `pane.isLocked` is still false and never rerun when `locks.editor` later becomes true. The existing generations-pane route-unlock logic avoids this by depending on both route state and live pane state: `src/features/gallery/components/GenerationsPane/hooks/useGenerationsPaneController.ts:234-238`.
